nasb.text: Therefore thus says the Lord God, ‘Behold, I am against Pharaoh king of Egypt and will break his arms, both the strong and the broken; and I will make the sword fall from his hand.

esv.text: Therefore thus says the Lord God: Behold, I am against Pharaoh king of Egypt and will break his arms, both the strong arm and the one that was broken, and I will make the sword fall from his hand.

cnv.text: 因此，主耶和華這樣說：‘看哪！我與埃及王法老為敵；我必打斷他有力的膀臂，和已經折了的膀臂，使刀從他的手中掉下。

ccb.text: 主耶和华说，‘我要与埃及王法老为敌，我要把他那强壮的臂膀和曾经受伤的臂膀一起打断，使刀从他手中掉落。
